relics.name: Abyssal Conch of Whispers
relics.description: A spiral shell that hums with distant tides.
relics.lore: It is said to carry the voices of a drowned civilization lost beneath endless waters.

relics.name: Tidebound Prism
relics.description: A crystal refracting light like shifting waves.
relics.lore: Forged in the pressure of the deep, it bends both light and memory.

relics.name: Barnacle-Encrusted Idol
relics.description: A corroded figure coated in ancient growth.
relics.lore: Once worshipped by ocean dwellers, now abandoned to the silent currents.

relics.name: Pearl of the Sunken Court
relics.description: A luminous pearl pulsing with faint warmth.
relics.lore: Legends claim it was carried by rulers of a kingdom swallowed by the sea.

relics.name: Coralbound Relic Tablet
relics.description: A stone slab etched with fading glyphs.
relics.lore: Its markings tell of rituals performed before the oceans claimed the land.
